drifted.spec_text: System MUST invalidate mesh caches when the simulation is reset or bodies are removed.
drifted.actual: Reset and disconnect clear server MeshCache and simulation EmittedMeshIds. Body removal (removeBody) does NOT clear orphaned mesh entries from the server cache.

drifted.spec_text: System MUST handle compound shapes by independently caching each child shape's geometry.
drifted.actual: Compound shapes are cached as a single atomic unit (one SHA-256 hash of entire Compound proto). Children are not individually identified or cached.
